  -- The general case when p, q, r are positive
  have h₁ : ‖(f : α → 𝕜) * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖(f : α → 𝕜)‖ₙ_[p] * ‖(g : α → 𝕜)‖ₙ_[q] := by
    have h₂ : ENNReal.HolderTriple (↑p : ℝ≥0∞) (↑q : ℝ≥0∞) (↑r : ℝ≥0∞) := by simpa [hpqr] using hpqr
    have h₃ : ‖(f : α → 𝕜) * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖(f : α → 𝕜)‖ₙ_[p] * ‖(g : α → 𝕜)‖ₙ_[q] := by
      -- Use the general Hölder's inequality for L^p spaces
      calc
        ‖(f : α → 𝕜) * g‖ₙ_[r] = ‖fun a : α => f a * g a‖ₙ_[r] := rfl
        _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
          -- Apply Hölder's inequality for the product of two functions
          have h₄ : ‖fun a : α => f a * g a‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
            -- Use the fact that the product of two L^p functions is in L^r
            have h₅ : ENNReal.HolderTriple (↑p : ℝ≥0∞) (↑q : ℝ≥0∞) (↑r : ℝ≥0∞) := by simpa [hpqr] using hpqr
            -- Use the Hölder's inequality for the product of two functions
            have h₆ : ‖fun a : α => f a * g a‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
              -- Use the Hölder's inequality for the product of two functions
              calc
                ‖fun a : α => f a * g a‖ₙ_[r] = ‖fun a : α => f a * g a‖ₙ_[r] := rfl
                _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
                  -- Use the Hölder's inequality for the product of two functions
                  exact
                    calc
                      ‖fun a : α => f a * g a‖ₙ_[r] = ‖fun a : α => f a * g a‖ₙ_[r] := rfl
                      _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
                        -- Use the Hölder's inequality for the product of two functions
                        exact
                          norm_mul_le_of_Holder _ _ h₂
            exact h₆
          exact h₄
        _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by rfl
    exact h₃
  simpa using h₁
